feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Disable Create button using SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hello,

I am developing an app using restful ABAP where I have a parent entity as list report and child entity as line item (table) in the object page.
I am trying to disable the 'Create' button based on some conditions for the child entity. Following are the steps I followed.

1. In the projection view for child entity, I defined the following
@UI.createHidden: #(Hide_create)

2. Created a virtual field in the projection view
@ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_FIELD_CONFIG'
virtual Hide_create: abap_boolean

3. in class ZCL_FIELD_CONFIG, i am passing Hide_create = abap_true based on some conditions.

Here, the control is never going to the class ZCL_FIELD_CONFIG to calculate the Hide_create value.
But, if I give the annotation @UI.createHidden:true in the projection view, the create button is disabled.

Please let me know how can I disable it based on the condition.

entry.title: RAP V4+Flexible Programming Model macro Table editable
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have RAP managed with draft  OData V 4. I created an app in VS Code. I want to have editable table in my list report. I use sap.fe.macros.Table. 

 
When I tried to preview my app, the table can´t be edited:
 
When I open object page and press edit button, the table is then in then in edit mode:
 
Opening object page with edit mode causes some issues by editing. How can I start with the table in edit mode without opening object page / detail page?
 
or the question should be: what exactlly is going behind the scene when the button EDIT in the object page is being pressed?
please help.
thank you.
Jarda

entry.title: Using Database Tables created using RAP in Custom Fields
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created a Report Using RAP in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud, we want to use the key field  from this report as a Value Help(F4) into a custom field on sales order screen. The Database table when view in "View Browser" is released for both "Key User" and "Cloud Development"

 

 

but when we go to create a "Custom Field Based on CDS" the respective view is not displayed. Even if we try creating a Custom CDS View this view is not available.

Thanks and Regards,

Ashish Talekar

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility @Expert

entry.title: Field value not getting save filled using custom action
entry.content:
Hi All,

I m creating a new record using manage app,my requirement is to get a value of one particular field let say NEW PRICE using custom button and I am able to achieve this and able to pass the value to this field from my logic to UI screen and this should get saved when we press save button.

 

the issue when I press save for first time all the record is getting saved but NEW PRICE is blank on screen but when I edit it again and again press the custom button the NEW PRICE gets populate again and this time after pressing save the NEW PRICE FIELD appears. I want it to appear when we press save for 1st time.

2nd issue is I used dynamic feature to enable or disable the field based on condition. But the button is hidden by default and appears when the condition is fulfilled as per logic written. I want this button should be DISABLED instead of disappear.

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: ABAP Integration with FastAPI for File Uploads: Seeking Code Guidance
entry.content:
Problem Statement:

I am working on integrating an ABAP system with a FastAPI server to upload files via HTTP POST requests. I have a FastAPI endpoint set up to receive file uploads, and I need assistance with creating the ABAP code to send a file to this endpoint.

Description:

  1. FastAPI Endpoint: I have a FastAPI endpoint (POST /upload/) set up to receive file uploads. The endpoint expects the file to be included in the body of the request.

  2. ABAP System: On the ABAP side, I need to write code that reads a file from the filesystem and sends it to the FastAPI endpoint via an HTTP POST request.

Requirements:

  1. HTTP POST Request: The ABAP code should construct an HTTP POST request to the FastAPI endpoint.

  2. Multipart Form Data: The file should be sent as multipart form data in the body of the POST request.

    curl -X POST -F "file=@data.json" https://endpoint.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/upload/ This curl works on vscode or command prompt. I want to achieve same from ABAP. 

    Server accepts data file containing JSON, does processing and returns JSON. Sever side is python.
    #if_http_client #abap #btp #httprequests #fileuploads #Post @Tomas_Buryanek I saw your answer for similar query on image upload to servicenow. Kindly help with this, seeking your expertise.

    Regards,
    Naveen

entry.title: How to export CSV file with standard and custom API S/4HANA Cloud public edition
entry.content:
My customer request some requirements about processing CSV in S/4HANA Cloud. 

  1. Can I enhance logic of a standard API( ex OData, SOAP) to return CSV file for client who call API. Can I enhance logic of a standard API to store a CSV file in server or local? (S/4HANA Cloud-standard APIs)
  2. Can I create a custom API(ex OData, HTTP service) to return CSV file for client who call API. Can custome API store a CSV file in server or local?

About custom API, I created a simple HTTP service. But when I call FM GUI_DOWNLOAD to store a CSV file, I get an error that is using FM GUI_DOWNLOAD is not permitted.

I don't have technical knowledge to resolve this customer request. So, can hep me and give me knowledge related to my customer's request?

Best regards

entry.title: Retrieve a CSV file by API: only first row is retrieved
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm trying to retrieve a csv file from a rest API, but when the body is retrieved I have only the first row of csv. Below how I do, where is the mistake? (with Postman is ok)

Many thanks in advance.

example of csv

"sf__Id","sf__Error",Cod_cliente__c,Name,Partita_iva__c,Indirizzo__CountryCode__s,Indirizzo__StateCode__s,Indirizzo__City__s,Indirizzo__PostalCode__s,Indirizzo__Street__s

0008000141,COMPANY 1 S.P.A.,IT0201124,IT,PD,Padova,35020,"VIA test, 2"

cl_http_client=>create_by_url

go_http_client->request->set_header_fields( fields = lt_header_fields ).

go_http_client->request->set_method( if_http_request=>co_request_method_get ).

go_http_client->send

go_http_client->receive

gv_response = go_http_client->response->get_cdata( ).

here I have only the first row

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Project Creation Error in ADT
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am getting this weird error : You were successfully authenticated, but an error occurred during fetching the Service Instance's SAP System ID.

As i refered atleast 10 different blogs and solutions but still not able to resolve this issue

Simply, I have created abap enviroinment and try to create abap cloud project in ADT , But ending up getting this error.

I have tried booster and manually created abap enviroinment , its of no use

Need your solution ...

Screenshots : 

ABAP Cloud SAP BTP, ABAP environment ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: ABAP RAP - How to refresh the list of childrens after an root action has created a new child
entry.content:
I have a root-child data model (User-\_ChangeRequest), where childrens can be created through an action from the object page of the root entity.

I tried many scenarios already, but in no one of these the list of child nodes gets reloaded, after the action has created a new child:

action with result [1] $self

 

 

define behavior for Z_R_User alias User
{
...
  action ( features:instance ) createChangeRequest result [1] $self;
...
}

 

 

Filling the result parameter from the action

 

 

READ ENTITIES OF Z_R_User IN LOCAL MODE
     ENTITY User
     ALL FIELDS
     WITH VALUE #( FOR mapped_request IN mapped-changerequest
                 ( %tky = CORRESPONDING #( mapped_request-%tky ) ) )
     RESULT DATA(update_result).

result = VALUE #( FOR user IN update_result
                  ( %tky   = CORRESPONDING #( user-%tky )
                    %param = user ) ).

 

 

 action with result [1] entity Z_R_ChangeRequest

 

 

define behavior for Z_R_User alias User
{
...
  action ( features : instance ) createChangeRequest result [1] entity Z_R_ChangeRequest;
...
}

 

 

 Filling the result parameter from the action

 

 

READ ENTITIES OF Z_R_User IN LOCAL MODE         
     ENTITY ChangeRequest                                    
     ALL FIELDS                                              
     WITH VALUE #( FOR mapped_request IN mapped-changerequest
                   ( %tky = mapped_request-%tky ) )          
     RESULT DATA(update_result).                             
                                                             
result = VALUE #( FOR request IN update_result               
                  ( %tky   = CORRESPONDING #( request-%tky ) 
                    %param = request ) ).

 

 

 

factory action 

 

 

define behavior for Z_R_User alias User
{
...
  factory action ( features : instance ) createChangeRequest [1];
...
}

 

 

 I had to fill the table user in the changing parameter mapped manually, because if not the following error appears:

 

 

 

LOOP AT mapped-changerequest INTO DATA(request).                 
  mapped-user = VALUE #( BASE mapped-user                        
                         ( %tky = CORRESPONDING #( request-%tky )
                           %cid = request-%cid ) ).              
ENDLOOP.

 

 

But as mentioned before, no scenario get the child list updated after the action.

The function "side effects" has the option, that a entity will be reloaded after an action, but the feature is not available on our on-premise 2022 S/4HANA system:

action: Whenever the action is executed on the UI, the side effect is triggered and the defined targets are reloaded.

side effects { action MyAction affects Targets }

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/side-effects#types-of-side-effects

Has anyone a suggestion how to achive this behavior?

entry.title: How to hide a result list column in a value help?
entry.content:
In BTP ABAP environment, I am making a value help based on a CDS entity.

The @UI.selectionField: [] annotation works fine, and the filters are rendered in the proper order.

The @UI.LineItem: [ { position: # } ] also works fine where it is maintained, in that the search results are displayed in the correct order.

However, the fields that do not have @UI.LineItem annotation maintained are still displayed in the result list.  They are added to the result list at the end, after all the other fields with a @UI.LineItem annotation. I have tried to maintain @UI.LineItem: [ { hidden: true } ] to these fields, but they are still displayed.

These fields are required in the CDS view entity (they are selection fields) and must not be displayed in the result list. How do I prevent these unwanted result list fields from being displayed?

entry.title: Accessing standard tables from CDS views
entry.content:
Hi.

I am very new to public cloud and CDS views. We would like to read some table data from Public Cloud and it does seem that the old familiar table names are not in the list of tables to read from.

Take for example USR02 and UST12. Does these tables still exist in Public Cloud? If so, how can we create a CDS view to read from here as it seems like they are not in the list of predefined tables.

entry.title: Create Menu Button/Action within a Section
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have a RAP-based Fiori app (OData V2).
I want to create a menu button on my app's Object Page within the "myObjectFacet" section.
To do this I used the approach described in the standard documentation (here).
So, I expect to see three buttons (Action1, Action2, Action3) inside one (Actions), but I see them as separate button.
The "menu" property doesn't seem to have any effect at all.
I would be grateful for any useful hint, link or advice from your side.

Thank You!

My implementation (manifest.json)

 

"sap.ui.controllerExtensions": {
	"sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.view.Details": {
		"controllerName": "...ObjPageExt",
		"sap.ui.generic.app": {
			"ZC_MyObjPg": {
				"EntitySet": "ZC_MyObjPg",
				"Sections": {
					"myObjectsFacet": {
						"id": "myObjectsFacet",
						"Actions": {
							"ActionOne": {
								"id": "ActionOne",
								"text": "{@i18n>actOne}",
								"press": "onExecAction",
								"visible": true,
								"enabled": true
							},
							"ActionTwo": {
								"id": "ActionTwo",
								"text": "{@i18n>actTwo}",
								"press": "onExecAction",
								"visible": true,
								"enabled": true
							},
							"ActionThree": {
								"id": "ActionThree",
								"text": "{@i18n>actThree}",
								"press": "onExecAction",
								"visible": true,
								"enabled": true
							},
							"MenuActions": {
								"text": "{@i18n>act}",
								"visible": true,
								"menu": [
									"ActionOne",
									"ActionTwo",
									"ActionThree"
								]
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

 

Result

entry.title: LastChangedAt is not updated by RAP framework
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am working on a RAP managed scenario with draft and I am observing that administrative field

Changed At is not changing at all when I am saving the record. Local Instance last Changed At is being updated after every change.

I have annotated these 2 fields in my root CDS view as below.

 

 

 

My understanding is that on every change of active instance, LastChangedAt is updated and LocalLastChangedAt is updated on every change of draft instance by the RAP framework.

 

Please help me to understand why this is not working.

 

Thanks,

Imteyaz

entry.title: A Waring message is displayed when creating an error message in RAP
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I had to create a save_modified method in my Service and there creating an error message.

APPEND VALUE #( %tky = VALUE #( %is_draft  = if_abap_behv=>mk-on        
                                HeaderUuid = lv_header_uuid )           
                %msg = new_message( id         = lx_runtime->id             
                                    number     = lx_runtime->number         
                                    severity   = lx_runtime->severity_error )
) TO reported-header.

The UI displays a warning message with the option to cancel or save the dataset.

I would expect an error message and no option to save the dataset.

Does anybody knows how to achieve this?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: SAP RAP Application Item node create button not visible Odata V2
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have created a custom RAP application with Header/Item data with Draft functionality using OData V2 service. While Preview service from Eclipse Create button at Item level is visible. 

But when the service is deployed using BAS on Public cloud system the Create button is not visible.

Can you guide me in this on why create button is not visible once OData v2 service is deployed and How can I make the create button visible.

 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: REST API Communication
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,
Is it possible to have communication between different BO's in same SAP box(on premise) using rest APIs?
For example in my SAP box,I have two RAP BOs B1 and B2 having own service bindings.
In case a document getting created in B1 ,I want to communicate that to B2 .
I can raise an event in B1 but where will I register this event and subscription to B2?
Request your suggestions / feedback on this ?
Regards,
Ratheesh BS

entry.title: Excel Upload By RAP Without Extending on SAP BTP/Business Application Studio Platform?
entry.content:
I want to Upload Data by Excel using RAP Applications, without Extending this Service on SAP BTP Platform Bcoz in my case we dont have any BTP Subscription.

I Already go through with this Blog and it is working fine but here we need to extend the service on BTP Platform. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/excel-upload-using-rap-part-1/ba-p/13545399

So please suggest how we can acheive the same using RAP Application Only.

entry.title: How to update key field in RAP managed scenario?
entry.content:
I am implementing a RAP based List Report app in S/4HANA On-Premise 2022 and have the need to update a key field during a determination method.

The scenario is a simple Document Header table with multiple Items (child entities), and whenever an item is deleted I want to redetermine all the Item positions of the document to make sure they stay ordered (10, 20, etc.).

Example: If Item number 10 is deleted, Item 20 would become 10, Item 30 would become 20 and so on.

However the item position field is part of the primary key of the item table, and possibly that is preventing the EML MODIFY statement from working correctly. Is there a way to update a key field in this managed scenario?
I would like to avoid having a separate GUID type key, and also deleting the items and re-inserting them inside the same determination method doesn't seem to work either.

Thank you

entry.title: Fiori RAP action return another entity open its page
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have 2  RAP applications (oData V4) with ListReports and their ObjectPages. Lets say the first is for contacts and the second for meetings. Both are working well. I added an action to contact list. The action should create a meeting with the selected contact:

in contact behavior:

 action meet result [1] entity ZI_CRM_Meeting;

in behavior class:

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF ZI_CRM_Meeting
     ENTITY Meeting
      CREATE FROM VALUE #( FOR <instance> IN keys (
         %cid = <instance>-%cid_ref
         ContitUuid = <instance>-ContitUuid
         %is_draft = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
         %control = VALUE #( ContitUuid = if_abap_behv=>mk-on )
       )
      )
       MAPPED DATA(mapped_create)
       REPORTED DATA(reported_creat)
       FAILED DATA(failed_create).

   READ ENTITIES OF ZI_CRM_Meeting
    ENTITY Meeting
     ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( mapped_create-meeting )
      RESULT DATA(created_result).


    result = VALUE #( FOR position IN created_result ( %is_draft   = position-%is_draft
                                                            %key = position-%key
                                                            ContitUuid = position-ContitUuid
                                                            %param-%is_draft = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                            %param-%key = position-%key
                                                            %param-ContitUuid = position-ContitUuid  ) ).

The draft is being created in the backround. But I want the object page from the meeting app to be opened with the draft to edit and save the draft. How to achieve it?

Thanks.

Jarda

entry.title: How to submit multiple rows of an editable SmartTable?
entry.content:
I created a SmartTable which has the propertie editable="true". Shown as follows:

How can I select all updated rows of the table and update them in the backend?

I was thinking to select every updated row so I can call them in the controller with getSelectedIndices and then update each row with a PUT method. Would that be possible like that or is there a simpler way to update the table?
